title: Melted Norwegian Cheese Custard
description: A comforting Norwegian dish featuring a citrusy cheese custard with a perfect cheese pull, all wrapped up in a banana leaf.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Whisk together the eggs, sugar, and flour in a medium bowl.
Add the melted butter, orange zest, and orange juice to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
Stir in the shredded Gudbrandsdalsost cheese until well combined.
Cut the banana leaves into 4 equal sized squares and place them on a flat surface.
Spoon the cheese custard mixture onto the center of each banana leaf square.
Fold the banana leaves over the custard to form a tight package and secure with toothpicks if needed.
Place the packages on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the packages from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
